ab: Iha’an azak pitu’ tatnulan munha’an sipulan.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: Masipulin, mukumbu’in tataqu’an ca tataqu, tupa ca pancang tu “minduldula, masumsuma.”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: Matacqait ata bazbaz tupa tu “miqumicang tataqu.”
Uutu masipul tudiip, taqu’an azam tataqu malasbunun masipul is paitasanpia.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Bunun language of numbers.

ab: Malavi azam is tataqu silisili bazbaz, tusasauc azam is paitasanpia.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: Madia’ sala ca pisqancaipunin zaku malasbunun a qalinga.
en: I have learned many Bunun languages.

ab: Daqdaqanin azak munsipulan, daqdaqanin azak pisqanciap malasbunun, na isbazbazku patan’a tina.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Bunun language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
